'''Neesada Bari''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who served on the [[Gungan High Council/Legends|Gungan High Council]] on three occasions during her lifetime. She was the mother of [[Toba]], and the wife of [[Bullba Bari]].
